name: goldenmatch-monorepo
description: Not a real npm workspace — each package installs independently to avoid Windows symlink issues.

scripts.install:all: for d in packages/typescript/*; do npm --prefix "$d" install; done
scripts.test:all: for d in packages/typescript/*; do npm --prefix "$d" test; done
scripts.build:all: for d in packages/typescript/*; do npm --prefix "$d" run build; done
scripts.lint:all: for d in packages/typescript/*; do npm --prefix "$d" run lint; done
